title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2023-01 Dated February 01, 2023 Entitled "resolution Programming and Approving the Projects Under the 20% Municipal Development Fund for Cy 2022 Savings Amounting to Fifty-two Million Five Hundred Two Thousand One Hundred Thirty-five Pesos and 10/100 (P 52,502,135.90) for Continuing a Appropriation and Supplemental Investment Plan Cy 2023." Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 02/06/2023
